'''Hekula''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] and the son of the famous [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracer]] pilot [[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]]. Following in his father's footsteps, Hekula inherited [[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's Podracer]], which Sebulba had purchased from [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]].

Hekula raced against [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in an illegal podrace at the [[Great Dordon Caves]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Euceron]] during the [[Galactic Games/Legends|Galactic Games]] of [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]], but he crashed the [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] by latching it to another pod and abandoning it. This caused his father to forbid him from racing for life.

Hekula had a son named [[Pugwis]] who carried on the family tradition of [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]].
